title: Luffy Smashes the Candle Set
description: On pages 1–3, luffy smashes the candle set as usopp, Karoo, and Luffy counterattack against Mr. 5, Miss Valentine, and Mr. 3 as the wax trap begins to fall apart.
scene: Luffy Smashes the Candle Set. Usopp, Karoo, and Luffy counterattack against Mr. 5, Miss Valentine, and Mr. 3 as the wax trap begins to fall apart. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I haven't got a clue what that thing is,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But I'll destroy it!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Roger that! Get ready to see a whole different Usopp today!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Quick!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Just hurry it up or we'll harden up into wax!

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: What're you doing?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: If I'm going to harden up into a wax figure, I'd like to go with this pose.

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: What... Now's not the time for such jokes...!

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: Instead of worrying about poses, could you do something about your bleeding legs? It's painful just looking at it.

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: Then don't look at it.

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: In the first place, I can't believe you were stupid enough to actually think that you could cut off your feet and run away.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That's not what I was going to do. I was going to fight after cutting off my feet.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That's even more idiotic.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Shut up,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Mr. 3, those people are awfully relaxed.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This is

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I dare say the same applies to you, doesn't it, Miss Golden- Week?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I also

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: Even though we're still far from escaping from our current dilemma...

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: These two act as if they can't feel even an ounce of the danger we're in...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It seems we're not being taken seriously, doesn't it now...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is most unple- Asant,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: If you ask me,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Alright!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That boy doesn't look dependable at all.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Mr. 3! Please let us take care of H-

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: Hmph.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Take care of him? I won't tolerate further such nonsense, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: Just look! It's precisely because your attacks didn't phase him the least bit,

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: That he's now back here for more.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: At the very least, that man is too much for the likes of you to handle.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: just clean up the two other pieces of trash instead.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: I'll add strawhat Luffy to my wax-figure collection.

summary: This part centers on luffy smashes the candle set, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
